free_text: Intermediate-Energy Proton Scattering to the Ground
And Negative-Parity States of Ca-40,Zr-90 and Pb-208.
Isotopically Enriched Lead Targets (99% PB-208) Of 35
23 Mg/Cm**2 and Natural Calcium Targets (97% CA-40)
Of  25  and  50  Mg/Cm**2  Thickness were Used.Ch(2)
Targets were Also Used to Check the Normalization of
The Cross Sections by Comparing the Measured Value For
The Elastic Scattering  from  Hydrogen  with  Known Pp
Overall Absolute Errors of 10-15 % in the
Extracted Cross Sections are Due Mainly to Solid  Angle
And  Target  Uncertainties.There  are  not  Included in
Energy Resolution Varied from 120 to 300 KeV.
